updateRules.requiredReview: add schemaCompatibility.requiredAssumptions and coverageExactnessBoundaries for the new axis
updateRules.compatibilityCheck: archsig schema-compatibility must report requiresMigration for the added axis until reviewed
updateRules.nonConclusion: new axis support does not imply extractor completeness

updateRules.requiredReview: declare the source and target axis id in schemaCompatibility.fieldMappings
updateRules.compatibilityCheck: archsig schema-compatibility must surface renamed axis ids as requiresMigration
updateRules.nonConclusion: renamed axes do not preserve semantics by name alone

updateRules.requiredReview: record the removed axis as deprecated or require a migration note
updateRules.compatibilityCheck: archsig schema-compatibility must report requiresMigration when a boundary disappears
updateRules.nonConclusion: removed axes are not silently outOfScope

updateRules.requiredReview: preserve measuredZero / measuredNonzero / unmeasured / outOfScope distinction
updateRules.compatibilityCheck: archsig schema-compatibility must report requiresMigration for boundary changes
updateRules.nonConclusion: unmeasured is never rounded to measuredZero by migration

fieldMappings.requiredReview: preserve measuredZero / measuredNonzero / unmeasured / outOfScope distinction
default boundary changes require migration review
benchmark expected boundaries are part of compatibility review

requiredAssumptions.fallbackWhenMissing: report added axis as missing migration review; do not infer extractor completeness or a formal claim
report rename as missing migration review unless fieldMappings declare source and target; do not infer a formal claim
report changed boundary as missing migration review; do not infer a formal claim
